config.#: MAQAO ONE View config -- cp2k_optimized, feature/nnp-chebyshev (hybrid)
Same chebyshev binary profiled as 8 MPI ranks x 2 OpenMP threads =
16 cores, matching the core count of the pure-MPI configs.  LProf
reports per-thread activity, so the OpenMP runtime share (atomics,
barriers, CRITICAL reductions) is directly visible and comparable
to the native-spline-omp profile in Report 1 (Fig 4.7).
config.comments: cp2k_optimized feature/nnp-chebyshev -- minimax NNP path, hybrid 8x2.
